CB.name: Mansoor Delane
CB.strengths:
• Experienced, Physical Corner
• Good Ball Skills, Football IQ
• Reads Routes Well, Locates Ball
• Smooth Backpedal/Trigger in Run
• Good Size, Strength, Burst, Recover
• High Floor, Decent Ceiling
• Shows Ideal Mindset
CB.weaknesses:
• Some Stiffness due to length
• Tackling Technique
• Grabby/Physical downfield
• Speed May Be a Limitation

CB.name: Jermod McCoy
CB.strengths:
• Natural Fluidity, Elite Ball Skills
• Vocal Leader, Play Maker
• Top Tier Instincts, Route Recognition
• Willing Tackler
• Scheme Versatile
• Closing Speed, Mirror Ability
CB.weaknesses:
• Missed 2025 with ACL Injury
• Inconsistent Recovery Speed
• Gets Grabby Downfield When Losing
• Tackling in Space

CB.name: Avieon Terrell
CB.strengths:
• Tremendous Man Coverage
• Has Instincts/Feel to Excel in Zone
• Willing Tackler, Competitive Nature
• Reads Plays/Routes and QB's Eyes
• Very Good Ball Skills
• Route Mirroring prevents seperation
• Very Fast, Easy Speed, Twitchy, Agile
CB.weaknesses:
• Undersized, underweight
• Deep ball locating is slow
• Soft Press game needs work
• Urgency breaking downhill in run

CB.name: Colton Hood
CB.strengths:
• Physical, Competitive, Instinctual
• Excellent Press Skills, Leverage
• Aggressive At The Catch Point
• Good Size, Great Speed
• Brings Good Tackling to Run Game
CB.weaknesses:
• Off Coverage Instincts
• Inconsistent Physicality in Run
• Sticky Hips in Transition
• Loses Ball Focusing on Receiver
• Developing Instincts on Route Switches

DT.name: Peter Woods
DT.strengths:
• Size, Movement Skills, Quickness
• Rare Twitch, Power, Explosiveness combo
• Upper Body Strength, Pop in Hands
• Can Handle Double Teams
• Has Athleticism to Develop PR Ability
DT.weaknesses:
• Squat, Short Frame
• Minimal Pass Rush Production
• Step Back in 2025
• Down to Down Consistency
• Pad Level, Anchor, Balance
• Not Gap Sound, Overaggressive

DT.name: Lee Hunter
DT.strengths:
• Ideal Size, Strength, and Length
• Twitchy Upper Body, Violent Sheds
• Superior Bull Rush, Collapses Pocket
• Consistent Run Disruptor
• Can Win Both Phases With Strength
• Consistent PR Motor for Cleanup
DT.weaknesses:
• Subpar Athlete, Even For NT
• Lacks PR Moves Outside of Bullrush
• Waist Bender
• Technique Taking On Blocks

DT.name: Kayden McDonald
DT.strengths:
• Good Size, Thick Build, Massive Legs
• Natural Leverage Under Interior
• Athleticism Boosts Recovery Well
• Excellent Run Defender
• Can Consume Double Teams
• Solid Pocket Collapser
DT.weaknesses:
• Block Recognition
• Poor PR Motor and Technique
• Below Average Height/Length
• Little Upside in PR
• Reliance on Athleticism Fails Against Higher Competition

DT.name: Caleb Banks
DT.strengths:
• Outstanding Frame, Traits
• First Step Quickness, Closing Speed
• Strong Hands, Long Arms
• Can Handle Double Teams
• Has The Desired Traits To Develop
• Shows versatility in odd fronts
DT.weaknesses:
• Missed Most of 2025 With Foot Inj.
• Unpolish Hand Usage
• Can Fatigue Quickly
• Needs More PR Moves/Counters
• Plays Too High, Will Cost In NFL
• Older Prospect

DT.name: Christen Miller
DT.strengths:
• Ideal Frame - Plus Size & Strength
• Movement Skills, Short Area Quicks
• Disciplined Pad Level, Natural Base
• Recognizes Down Blocks
DT.weaknesses:
• Often Late Snap Reaction
• No Go To Pass Rush Moveset
• Finishing Reps in PR
• Minimal Production
• Poor Tackling Grade

ED.name: Rueben Bain Jr
ED.strengths:
• Tenacious, Violent, Relentless
• Extremely Productive
• Handwork, Leverage, PR Moves
• Positional Versatility
• Great Strenght, Edge Setter
• Explosive First Step
• Very Techinically Refined, both Phases
• Bullrush specialist
• Closing Speed for Size
ED.weaknesses:
• Undersized, Not Long Enough
• Gap Discipline/Over-Aggressive
• Middling Flexibility
• Tackling Grade
• Tackling Radius

ED.name: David Bailey
ED.strengths:
• Rare Twitch, Agility, Fluidity
• Highest Pressure Rate in CFB
• Deep Pass Rush Moveset
• Elite First Step Quickness
• Leveral, Lower Body Flexion
• Instinctual, Mid-Rush Counters
ED.weaknesses:
• Seems limited to 2 point stance
• Lacks Needed Size, Espec. In Run
• Hand Usage, Rush Plans
• Lacks Consistent Anchor
• Lacks Toughness, Physicality
• Going to be 23 year old rookie

ED.name: Akheem Mesidor
ED.strengths:
• Tenacious, Rabid, Tone Setter
• Great PR Move Set, Elite Hand Usage
• Cosntantly Countering, Adapts
• Guick, Impressive COD/Movement
• Great Bend At Top of Rushes
• Phsyical Edge Setter
• Versatile Exp, Can Kick Inside
• Disciplined in Spying QBs
• True Playmaker Ability
ED.weaknesses:
• Injury History (Foot), Age (25 Yr Rook)
• Average Speed to Power
• Lacks Desired Height/Weight
• Can Struggle To Disengage in Run
• Subpar Strength vs Strong Anchor

ED.name: Keldric Faulk
ED.strengths:
• Ideal Size/Frame/Wingspan
• Immediate High End Run Def.
• Solid Block Shedder
• Versatile Experience
• High Motor Pass Rusher
• Young Player, 21 Y.O. Rookie
ED.weaknesses:
• Lacks Elite Athleticism
• Inconsistent Hand Usage
• Pass Rush Repetoire
• Pass Rush Production is poor
• Technically Unrefined

ED.name: T.J. Parker
ED.strengths:
• NFL Strength and Size Profile
• Ready-Made Run Defender Day 1
• Polished Pass Rush Moves
• Natural Feel for PR Manipulation
• Can Win With Power in PR
• Smooth COD and Lateral Movement
• Difficult to Displace in Run
• Uses Hands Well In Both Phases
ED.weaknesses:
• Agility and Flexibility Subpar
• Lacks Burst or Explosiveness
• Lacks Quality Counter Moves
• Step Back in Production in 2025
• Pass Rush Angles

ED.name: Cashius Howell
ED.strengths:
• Burst off the line
• Solid Group of PR Moves
• C.O.D., Bend, Smooth Movement
• Ideal Motor, Relentless
• Consisteny PRWR in SEC for 2 Years
• Twitched Up, Flexibile
ED.weaknesses:
• Undersized, Cant Hold POA
• One Dimensional PR Specialist
• Cannot Set an Edge
• PR Plan Needs Variety, Refinement

ED.name: R Mason Thomas
ED.strengths:
• Explosive, Quick, Exceptional Speed
• Athletic, Bendy, Ankle Flexion
• Effective Speed to Power
• Great Natural Leverage, Pad Level
• Upper Body Strength
• Shows a Solid PR Move Variety
• Non Stop Pass Rush Motor
ED.weaknesses:
• Significant Injury Past, Both Ankles
• Lower Body Strength, Limited Frame
• Lacks Ability To Set The Edge
• Length Gets Him Trapped in Blocks
• Handwork Needs Polished
• Seems Limited to Stand Up LB

LB.name: Arvell Reese
LB.strengths:
• Phsyically Elite, Ideal Build
• Top End Closing Speed
• Speed to Cover in Zone
• Good pursuit angles/leverage
• Solid PR Repetoir
• Dynamic Depolyment Potential
LB.weaknesses:
• Avg Change of Direction
• Lack of Exp Shows Up in Diagnosing
• Fooled by Play Action/misdirection
• Upper Body Strength
• Still Needs to Fill Out Frame

LB.name: Sonny Styles
LB.strengths:
• Sideline to Sideline Range
• Intelligent, Instinctual leader 
• Impeccable Tackler
• Excellent Coverage Skills
• Natural Leverage/Pursuit Angles
• Short Area Quickness, Pursuit Speed
LB.weaknesses:
• Slightly Undersized, Needs To Add Weight
• Block Deconstruction/Recognition
• Tight Hips Hurt COD Downhill
• Average Blitz Instincts

LB.name: CJ Allen
LB.strengths:
• High End Speed, Great Athlete
• Ball Skills, Vertical
• High Motor, Violent Player
• Very Sure Tackling Ability
• Side to Sideline Range
• Improving Pass Rush Ability
LB.weaknesses:
• Lacks Size/Pop
• Struggles with Processing/Play Recognition
• Key Mental Lapses in Coverage
• Mixed Reviews on overall Cov. Ability

IOL.name: Olaivavega Ioane
IOL.strengths:
• Grip Strength, Jarring Punch
• Impressive Core Power, Body Control, and Balance
• Thich Limbs, Broad Frame, Great Build
• Pass Pro Grading
• No Hits/Sacks in 2025
IOL.weaknesses:
• Lacks Athleticism, Foot Quickness
• Below Average Adjustments
• Loses Track of Stunting Linemen

OT.name: Spencer Fano
OT.strengths:
• Relentless Motor, Excellent Effort
• Strong, Independent Hand Usage
• Excellent, Aggressive Run Blocking
• Balance, Posture, Recovery
• Bend, Body Control, Athleticism
• Swift, Controlled Feet
• High Floor Overall, High Ceiling in Run
OT.weaknesses:
• Lean Build, Apparent in Pass
• Inconsistent, erratic strike timing
• Exposes Chest in Pass Pro

OT.name: Francis Mauigoa
OT.strengths:
• Explosive, Violent Player
• Strong, Independent Hand Usage
• Elite Anchor, Strength Profile
• Knee Bender, Fluid Lower Body
• Body Control, Recovery Ability
• Natural Mirror, Feel for Timing
OT.weaknesses:
• Just Adequate Foot Speed
• Limited Range in Pass Pro
• Overaggressive, Leaves Feet Behind
• Processing Against Blitz
• May Not Have Length for Tackle

OT.name: Caleb Lomu
OT.strengths:
• Strong Pass Blocking Skills
• Quick Feet, Athletic, Balanced
• Great Frame, Room To Grow
• Diverse Punch Moves, Well-Timed
• Strong Anchor, Knee Bender
• Adept Recognize/React
• Plays With Sufficient Edge
OT.weaknesses:
• Lacks Needed UB Strength for Run
 Game
• Pad Level/Demeanor Needs Help
• Unpolished positioning in Run Game
• Hands/Feet Inconsistent Sync
• Below Average Sustain/Finish in Run

OT.name: Kadyn Proctor
OT.strengths:
• Elite Power & Physicality
• Massive Frame, Dense Build
• Athletic Anomoly with Size

OT.name: Monroe Freeling
OT.strengths:
• Ideal Length/Frame, High End Athlete
• Redirects Feet Quickly
• Functional Anchor for Bull Rush
• Showed Steady Improvement Through the Year
OT.weaknesses:
• Inconsistent Hand Placement
• No Independent Hand Usage
• Plays Upright, Lunges
• Run Game Landmarks
• Needs To Fill Out Frame

SAF.name: Caleb Downs
SAF.strengths:
• 3 Year Starter since Freshman
• Excellent Tackler, esp. in open Field
• Elite instincs, read & react
• Superb range, speed, movement
• Rare coverage ability for Safety
• Anticipates Routes, Mirrors, Prevents Seperation
• Vocal Leader, Grinder
• Experienced/Successful Against Top Programs
SAF.weaknesses:
• Undersized, May Affect Tackling NFL
• Pursuit Angles Could Improve
• Gambles too often
•

SAF.name: Dillon Thieneman
SAF.strengths:
• Top Tier Effort/Motor
• Willing and Able Run Defender
• Backpedal and Athleticism to Mirror and Trigger Effectively
• Great Range and Instincts
• Superb Coverage Grade
• Allignment Versatile
SAF.weaknesses:
• Processing Speed Needs To Improve
• Pursuit Angles Inconsistent
• Gets Caught With Eyes in Backfield

SAF.name: Emmanuel McNeil-Warren
SAF.strengths:
• Great Length/Frame
• Consistently Well Graded for 3 Years
• Turnover Machine
• Zone Coverage Instincts
• Plays Physical
• Solid Closing Burst
SAF.weaknesses:
• Pattern/Route Recognition
• Poor in Single High Cov
• Overly Aggressive Angles
• Hestiation in Decisions
• Mirroring Speedy Receivers

WR.name: Jordyn Tyson
WR.strengths:
• Burst, Acceleration of The Line
• Instinctual, Experienced Playmaker
• Route Running, Attacking Angles
• Strong Seperation Ability
• Short Area Quickness, Burst
• Massive Catch Radius
• Contested Catch Toughness
• Elite Ball Skills/Body Control
• Spent Time Honing his Craft
WR.weaknesses:
• Not Blazing Speed
• Functional Play Strength is Meh
• Inefficient Footwork on Inbreaking Routes
• Long History of Injuries

WR.name: Carnell Tate
WR.strengths:
• Elite Consistency, Ultra Reliable
• Long Strider, Size Mismatch
• Super Polished Route Running
• Contested Catch Machine
• Timing, Body Control, Adjustments
• Some Nice YAC Ability
• Creates Seperation with Burst
• Spatial Awareness
• Attacks the Football
WR.weaknesses:
• Lacks Needed Strength to be WR1
• Good Speed, Not Elite
• Average Blocker
• Kind of a Nerd

WR.name: Makai Lemon
WR.strengths:
• Elite Grip Strength, Uber-Reliable
• Instinctual Playmaker
• Elite Ball Tracking, Timing, Focus
• Ideal Competitive Mentality
• High End Burst, Acceleration
• Big Play Potential After The Catch
• Very Polished Route Runner
• True ST Contributor
WR.weaknesses:
• Average Size, Largely Limited to Slot
• More Quick Than Fast
• Struggles Against Press
• Limited Catch Radius

WR.name: Denzel Boston
WR.strengths:
• Big Bodied, Competitive, Tough
• Wingspan, Elite Hand Strength
• Ball Tracking, Adjustments
• RZ Threat W/ Proven Production
• Allignment Versatile, Diverse Tree
• Elite Ball Skils
• Fluid Route Running, Good Burst
WR.weaknesses:
• Lacks Top End Speed
• Linear Press Release
• Production Dipped Against Quality Opponents

WR.name: KC Concepcion
WR.strengths:
• High End Burst, Acceleration
• Savvy Route Running to Separate
• Elite Short Area Footwork
• Very TD Productive
• Elite After The Catch Ability
• Return Ability
• Hard To Square up/tackle
• Ball Tracking, Balance, Timing
WR.weaknesses:
• Lacks Speed Variance, Top End Speed
• Focus Drops
• Run Blocking
• Less Experienced as WR

WR.name: Zachariah Branch
WR.strengths:
• High End Speed, Explosiveness, Acc. 
• Can Stick and Cut at Full Speed
• Excellent YAC Ability in Space
• Real PR/KR Value
• Elusive Playmaker with the Ball
• Natural Usage out of the Backfield
WR.weaknesses:
• Undersized, Limited Catch Radius
• Rushes Routes, Rounds Turns
• Limited Downfield Ablity
• Jumps Unnecessarily for the Ball

WR.name: Chris Bell
WR.strengths:
• Excellent Heigh, Weight, Frame
• Impressive Build Up Speed
• Dangerous YAC, Hard to Bring Down
• Adjusts To Throws Well
• Elite In-Breaking Route Receiver
• Huge Performance in Miami Upset
WR.weaknesses:
• Lacks Short Area Quickness
• Unrefined Route Runner
• Late Season ACL Tear
• Struggles to Beat Press W/Footwork
• Avg At Best Ball Skills
• Not A Natural Hands Catcher

WR.name: Malachi Fields
WR.strengths:
• Elite Size, Strength, High Point Ability
• Able to Leap, Adjust, Extend
• Dominant Blocker
• Size Makes Him Hard To Bring Down
• Works Outside His Frame Well
WR.weaknesses:
• Lacks Explosiveness, High End Speed
• Delayed Release Vs Press
• Lacks Foot Quickness to Separate
• Very Basic Route running
